validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv && python -m uv sync --extra dev --python /usr/bin/python3.12
validated_commands.notes: Use pip install uv (not curl install). Use python -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-12: 7 failed (policy_status ANSI only), 8287 passed.

coverage_baseline.notes: 7 pre-existing failures: policy_status ANSI issue only. Runtime factory failures resolved in main.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs. PR #1155 was merged on 2026-05-08.

testing_backlog.notes: 13 tests added in run 2026-05-12. Branch: test-assist/install-template-tests. PR pending.
Helper functions covered (PR #1206). Early-exit paths covered (PR #1233). Full compilation flow (after line 461) still largely untested - complex, requires filesystem and compiler setup.
18 tests exist in test_deps_update_command.py (passing). Check what update() orchestration still uncovered.

8 network-gated integration test files need pytestmark annotations before pytest-discovery swap (#1168 gate 1). Offered to help on 2026-05-09. Await maintainer confirmation. No new comments as of 2026-05-12.
7 tests failing: policy_status uses Rich unicode but test expects ASCII. PR #1029 closed by maintainer - do not retry.

open_prs.title: Skip runtime factory tests when LLM not installed
open_prs.notes: Superseded - runtime_factory fix already in main. Commented suggesting closure.

tests(install): add unit tests for integration template module
